case.title: SPALDING LAUNDRY & DRY CLEANING v. DEPT. OF REV. OF KY.

opinion.h4: SPALDING LAUNDRY & DRY CLEANING v. DEPT. OF REV. OF KY., (1969)
SPALDING LAUNDRY & DRY CLEANING CO. v. DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE OF KENTUCKY APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF KENTUCKY No. 123. Decided October 13, 1969
opinion.p: T. Kennedy Helm, Jr., for appellant.
William S. Riley, Assistant Attorney General of Kentucky, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
opinion.h4: DUFFY STORAGE & MOVING CO. v. CITY AND COUNTY OF DENVER, (1969)
opinion.p: DUFFY STORAGE & MOVING CO. ET AL. v. CITY AND COUNTY OF DENVER ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF COLORADO No. 132. Decided October 13, 1969
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
